summary: This is a very brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky shares that his book has appeared on Amazon.com, though it won't ship until March. He notes that the cover image shown is just a mockup and not the final design. The post is essentially a quick personal update with no substantive argument or analysis.
key_points: Joel's book appeared on Amazon before its March shipping date
The cover image on Amazon was a preliminary mockup, not the final design
money_quotes: How exciting, my book is already on Amazon!
key_insight: A brief personal announcement about Joel's upcoming book appearing on Amazon ahead of its release date.
